series_metadata.series_title: Publications, Photographs, Audio & Video Files, Event Files and Consent Forms
series_metadata.series_description: Electronic and paper files maintained for internal (within agency) and external (public) use. Records may include: Pamphlets; magazines; newsletters; informational updates; posters; forms; postcards; documents used to submit specifications and/or encumber money for print jobs to State Printing, OPI or outside vendors; photographs, digital images, negatives, slides, transparencies; edited audio recordings and video recordings; other electronic images of people and events related to OOD; event files and any additional record created for similar purposes. This includes the consent to release of information forms.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Records deemed have no agency or historic value should be retained in accordance with agency’s transient retention schedule. Records deemed of value shall be retained three (3) state fiscal years from date of publication or converted Machine Readable format ; Electronic: Records deemed have no agency or historic value should be retained in accordance with agency’s transient retention schedule. Records deemed of value shall be retained three (3) state fiscal years from date of publication or use. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying records
